abilityTarget: 在现场 Q&A 中抓住“早期收窄人群—降低变异—后期外推”的条件链，并明确说话人没有指定的 owner。

source.title: FDA Clinical Investigator Training Course (CITC) 2024 – Day One – Session One
source.organization: U.S. Food and Drug Administration · CDER Small Business and Industry Assistance
source.speaker: Kimberly Smith, MD, MS (FDA CDER moderator) and James P. Smith, MD, MS (Director, Office of New Drug Policy, FDA CDER)
source.description: FDA public Clinical Investigator Training Course Q&A. The moderator asks when a study population should be narrow or broad; the FDA speaker ties early signal detection to variability, then states the generalizability risk of remaining narrow. 60-minute plan: 8 min first listen, 8 min second listen, 10 min transcript check and shadowing, 25 min spoken simulation, 9 min score and review.

coldListenQuestions.label: TOPIC / DECISION
coldListenQuestions.question: 主持人要求比较的两个研究人群定义选择是什么？她特别排除了哪个相邻概念？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 比较人群应较窄还是较广；问题明确不是在问 enrichment 本身。

coldListenQuestions.label: SPEAKER POSITION
coldListenQuestions.question: James 对早期开发中收窄人群的立场是什么？这是否等于整个项目都应保持狭窄？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 早期可为识别信号而收窄、提高同质性；并非全程如此，后续应拓宽。

coldListenQuestions.label: EVIDENCE / DATA
coldListenQuestions.question: 他用什么“信号与噪音”的逻辑支持这一取舍？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 小效应更常见，需区分信号和噪音；降低变异有助于早期识别信号。

coldListenQuestions.label: RISK / UNCERTAINTY
coldListenQuestions.question: 若开发中始终只研究狭窄人群，后续可能出现什么问题？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 拓宽后疗效可能不如预期，且证据难以外推到实际会用药的人群。

coldListenQuestions.label: ACTION / OWNER
coldListenQuestions.question: 片段是否指定了具体 owner 或下一步？应如何把它转成项目行动？
coldListenQuestions.answer: 没有指定 owner 或时限；项目团队需把目标人群、变异控制和后续外推计划写入开发决策。

secondPassTargets.prompt: 抓住唯一的量化表达；不要凭空听成具体样本量。
secondPassTargets.hint: a fairly small number of patients — no discrete sample size is stated

secondPassTargets.prompt: 找出他对拓宽人群后的否定性表述，以及它否定的是什么。
secondPassTargets.hint: it does not work as well as you hoped after the population is broadened

secondPassTargets.prompt: 什么情况下，降低变异特别重要？
secondPassTargets.hint: when the effect may be smaller and the team needs to distinguish it from noise

secondPassTargets.prompt: 抓两组对照：大效应与小效应；狭窄人群与更广人群。
secondPassTargets.hint: very large effect versus smaller effect; narrow definition early versus broader population later

secondPassTargets.prompt: 谁提出问题，谁给出回答？在何处进入回答主体？
secondPassTargets.hint: Kimberly Smith addresses Jim; James P. Smith begins answering at about 1:55:06

blindSpots: “a fairly small number”不是具体样本量；片段未给 n，不能自行补数值。
说话人不是主张永久富集；早期降变异的价值与后期证据可推广性必须同时成立。
FDA 讲者未分派 owner、日期或方案修改；把这类原则直接写成具体监管要求是过度推断。

microClip.transcript: One approach to reducing variability is to more narrowly define a patient population, such that there is more homogeneity.
microClip.translation: 降低变异的一种方法，是更严格地界定患者人群，从而提高人群同质性。

pronunciation.label: LINK
pronunciation.note: 三个词组之间不断开；patient 的 /t/ 轻接 population。

pronunciation.label: STRESS
pronunciation.note: 重音落在论证动作和结果词；narrowly 不要吞掉第二音节。

speaking.prompt: 情境：一项 DEE 项目早期队列在高度限定的 LGS 亚群中出现疗效信号。团队拟把下一阶段仍限定在该亚群，以获得更干净的数据。你在 global medical meeting 中发言：先仅用 Position → Evidence → Risk/Uncertainty → Action/Ask 四个 bullet 准备，不写完整稿；录三遍 90 秒 → 60 秒 → 45 秒。随后进行 22 分钟口头模拟：每个 follow-up 连续回答 3 次（每次约 2 分钟），最后用 4 分钟作 meeting summary，明确 Clinical、Biostats 和 Medical 的 owner。当天累计开口至少 19 分钟。

prepLabels.label: POSITION
prepLabels.placeholder: 你支持、反对或限定支持继续限制人群的哪一点

prepLabels.label: EVIDENCE
prepLabels.placeholder: 现有信号、变异来源和目标产品人群真正支持什么

prepLabels.label: RISK / UNCERTAINTY
prepLabels.placeholder: 选择偏倚、外推性和安全性解释还缺什么

prepLabels.label: ACTION / ASK
prepLabels.placeholder: 需要哪个 owner 在何时给出什么分析或方案建议

followUps: What would make you broaden the population before seeing a second efficacy signal?
How would you explain the trade-off between a cleaner signal and generalizability to the clinical lead?
sentenceFrames: Before we decide, could I clarify whether the objective is to detect a signal or to support generalizability for the next stage?
I hear two separate decisions: defining the early cohort and planning when to broaden it; can we assign an owner to each?
